title: AgentTrustScore
description: Stable JSON output contract for AgentTrustScore.to_json() — composite trustworthiness metric for an agent run.

schema_version.description: Schema version identifier for this payload format.

overall.description: Geometric mean of all known (non-None) dimensions, rounded to 4 decimal places. Null when no evidence dimensions are present.

grade.description: Letter grade derived from overall score and number of known dimensions.

breakdown.description: Per-dimension scores. Keys are dimension names (e.g. task_success, evidence_completeness). Values are numbers in [0,1] rounded to 4 decimals, or null if the dimension is unknown.

known_dimensions.description: Count of dimensions with a real (non-null) score.

notes.description: Human-readable notes about the scoring (e.g. missing evidence, unverified receipt).
